name: io.github.hannasdev/mcp-writing
title: Writing MCP
description: Metadata-first fiction editing and reasoning tools for long-form writing projects.

environmentVariables.name: WRITING_SYNC_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Path to the manuscript sync folder that mcp-writing indexes and edits.

environmentVariables.name: DB_PATH
environmentVariables.description: Optional path for the SQLite index database used by the server.

environmentVariables.name: OWNERSHIP_GUARD_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Startup ownership policy for sync-folder files.
